test.command: bun test --max-concurrency=6 apps/dashboard/src apps/api/src packages/api/src packages/auth/src packages/db/src packages/env/src

typecheck.command: bun run check-types && bun x tsc -p apps/dashboard/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/auth/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/env/tsconfig.json --noEmit

lint.command: bun x ultracite check apps/dashboard/src apps/api/src packages/api/src packages/auth/src packages/db/src packages/env/src

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the supported `bun run dev:mobile` and root `bun run dev` workflow in the shared manifest, likely as additive commands or an explicit note about why they sit outside the current service schema.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md says root `bun dev` / `turbo dev` is a supported local entrypoint and this feature's verification steps require `bun run dev:mobile` plus a manual root `bun dev` check, but `.factory/services.yaml` currently defines only `api` and `dashboard` services.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a narrow fast-path for purely mechanical module-format or config-loader fixes so workers can avoid the full Midday-reference/library-heavy procedure when no architecture or runtime-contract decision is involved.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `mobile-metro-config-cjs-compat-fix` review passed, but the transcript skeleton for session `6df904ce-1e52-4bd2-8d5a-4849cdd97d79` shows no `midday-reference` invocation and the handoff already notes the tests-first step was not a good fit for this mechanical Metro config repair.
